name: RemSleep Holdings Inc.
business: The company focuses on the development and commercialization of innovative and minimally invasive solutions for patients with obstructive sleep apnea. Their primary product is the DeltaWave Nasal Pillow System, which received FDA 510K approval and was commercially launched in February 2026. The company sells to Durable Medical Equipment providers and hospitals.

exposures.sentence: Our focus is on the development and commercialization of innovative and minimally invasive solutions for patients with obstructive sleep apnea.

catalysts.event: Received updated FDA 510K approval broadening DeltaWave's indicated use to include institutional settings and wider patient populations.
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we received an updated FDA 510K approval that significantly broadens DeltaWave's indicated use beyond home-based CPAP therapy to include institutional settings and a wider range of patient populations.

catalysts.event: Commercial launch of DeltaWave product line.
catalysts.sentence: REMSleep Holdings Inc. announced the commercial launch of DeltaWave product line on February 24, 2026.
